node.text:
Another year that went by… 𝘧𝘢𝘴𝘵. A new age of running innovation and culture.​
​
Three world records. The first-ever sub-six-hour 100km. Thirty-two major medals in Tokyo, and 18 of 42 podium positions across the globe’s seven major marathons.​
​
From New York to Nardò, we collaborated with those who share our visions of speed and style to redefine what’s possible; one team behind the dream. ​
​
Here’s to next year – and all the excitement to come.​
​
 #YouGotThis​

There’s just no stopping @sabastiansawe 🥇😮‍💨 

Three straight marathon wins. Back-to-back majors. One special athlete. 

👟 #Adizero Adios Pro Evo 2 

#YouGotThis

node.text:
Tell us a better feeling than the post-run glow… we’ll wait.

#adidasSupernova

HISTORY for @hobbs_kessler 🤯

He smashes the 18-year-old 2000m indoor world record with an explosive 4:48.79 in Boston. 

#YouGotThis

When comfort carries you past the finish line. 

#adidasSupernova

node.text:
Running but make it ✨ super comfy ✨

The Dreamstrike+ midsole in the Supernova Rise 3 just hits different.

Fresh colours just dropped.
#adidasSupernova

70% of runners say their favourite part of the run is the end.

With comfort like this, you might start loving the run too.

#adidasSupernova

adidas Running x Hermanos Koumori

Enter the flow state.

Guided by presence, precision, and purpose. Where movement becomes instinct and the mind moves as freely as the body.

- - -

adidas Running x Hermanos Koumori​
​
Conéctate con el ritmo.​
​
Guiado por la presencia, la precisión y el propósito. Donde el movimiento se vuelve instinto y la mente se mueve tan libre como el cuerpo.​
​
#Adizero

adidas Running x Hermanos Koumori

Built for freedom of motion.

A minimal apparel system shaped by function, designed to move seamlessly through city, trail, and state of mind.

#Adizero 

- - -

adidas Running x Hermanos Koumori​
​
Diseñado para la libertad de movimiento.​
​
Una colección minimalista guiada por la función, creada para moverse sin esfuerzo entre la ciudad, el trail y el estado mental.​
​
#Adizero

Discover the latest adidas Running x Hermanos Koumori collection.​
​
Fast. Light. Precise. Purposeful.​
​
The new #Adizero EVO SL HK is built to move with intent:​
⚡️ New woven mesh upper with multi-stretch material for targeted support​
⚡️ LIGHTSTRIKE PRO midsole foam provides optimum resilience and speed​
⚡️ EVO SL outsole​

- - -

Descubre la nueva colección adidas Running x Hermanos Koumori.​
​
Rápido. Ligero. Preciso. Con propósito.​
​
El nuevo #Adizero EVO SL HK está diseñado para moverse con intención:​
⚡️ Nueva malla tejida con material multi-stretch para soporte.​
⚡️ Espuma LIGHTSTRIKE PRO que ofrece máxima respuesta y velocidad​
⚡️ Suela EVO SL

node.text:
Born in Mexico, brought to the world. Discover the latest adidas Running x Hermanos Koumori collection.​
​
Speed and soul in unison.​
​
@hermanoskoumori​
​
#Adizero​

​- - -
Nacidos en México, llevados al mundo.​
​
Descubre la nueva colección adidas Running x Hermanos Koumori.​
​
Velocidad y alma en un solo ritmo.​
​
@hermanoskoumori​
​
#Adizero

node.text:
Enter the flow state.

@hermanoskoumori 15.01.

She’s done it again 🙌

@jebet.agnes claims her first ever world 10k cross country title with an incredible win by 42 seconds in Tallahassee. 

An icon in all conditions. 

#YouGotThis

What a year for the Adizero EVO SL: a 2025 @runnersworldmag award winner.

And this is just the start.

node.text:
Results speak for themselves. 
Here’s to another year on top of the podium 🫡​
​
#YouGotThis #Adizero

Made for a variety of surfaces and shaped by intention: the Adizero Evo SL ATR. ​

Designed for speed, but built for purpose 🌬️​
​
#Adizero #EvoSLATR

Comfort starts here 🤩 

#adidasSupernova
